transcript:
FAKE — Discovery Call — Hartwell & Monroe Law Group
Date: May 10, 2026
Sales Rep: Jamie Caldwell
Attorney: Sarah Hartwell

Sarah: Thanks for making time today. We do family law and estate planning, based in Austin. I have two associates and a paralegal, been running the firm about seven years.

Jamie: What does revenue look like?

Sarah: We did about $680,000 last year. My goal is to hit $1.2 million in the next 18 months.

Jamie: How are you getting most of your cases right now?

Sarah: Mostly referrals. We tried Facebook ads about two years ago — spent maybe $1,500 a month for four months, didn't get much out of it. Never done Google ads.

Jamie: What's your average case value?

Sarah: Family law divorces are usually $4,000 to $7,000. Estate planning packages run about $2,500.

Jamie: Close rate when someone comes in for a consult?

Sarah: I'd say about 40%. I do most of the intake myself, which is part of the problem.

Jamie: If you could have the firm exactly where you want it — what does that look like?

Sarah: I want to not be the one doing intake. I want a team that handles that. I want to take a real vacation without my phone blowing up. My kids are 9 and 11 and I've missed too many of their games. I want the firm to run without me there every day.

Jamie: Google presence — do you know where you rank?

Sarah: I honestly have no idea. I have a Google Business profile — I think around 34 reviews. I don't really track it.

Jamie: Is estate planning growing?

Sarah: Probably 30% of revenue right now. I'd like it to be bigger, it's steadier work.

Jamie: Anything keeping you up at night?

Sarah: The inconsistency. Some months are great, some are really slow. I never know what's coming. And I feel like competitors are running circles around me online.
